allow: Bash(pkill -f "expo start" 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; npx expo start 2>&1 & *)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\), **d.get\('peerDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k\) for k in deps if k.startswith\('expo'\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\('dependencies',{}\); [print\(f'{k}@{v}'\) for k in sorted\(deps\) if 'expo' in k or 'react-native' in k]")
